gram_worthy_spots.name: Wankhede Stadium
gram_worthy_spots.description: Mumbai's iconic cricket stadium with a 33,000+ capacity located in the heart of the city. A must-see for sports enthusiasts and those wanting to catch the energy of Indian cricket culture.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Marine Drive
gram_worthy_spots.description: A scenic waterfront area with heavy police presence and great views, popular for evening walks and experiencing Mumbai's coastal beauty.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Jogeshwari East
off_the_beaten_path.description: A local residential area in eastern Mumbai with authentic neighborhood vibes and everyday local life, though visitors should be cautious of construction hazards in the area.
